scenarios.title: Codenames: give a legal opening clue
scenarios.prompt: Red spymaster to move. Return a one-word clue and count that is legal for the board.

expectedActions.label: ORBIT 1
expectedActions.note: A legal non-board clue with a conservative count.

scenarios.title: Codenames: legal red clue 01
scenarios.prompt: red spymaster to move. Return a legal one-word clue and a conservative count for this fixed board.
